hint: A traditional Irish social gathering of music, song, and dance — the heartbeat of Irish community life
fun_fact: Céilís have been bringing Irish communities together for centuries — from rural parish halls in Connaught to Boston ballrooms, they're where friendships are forged and traditions are passed down
